histogram.summary: The amount of time spent in overview mode. Overview mode is engaged by pressing the overview button. The time is measured from the moment the windows begin animating to a thumbnail size preview to when a window is selected or selection is canceled.

histogram.name: Ash.WindowSelector.TimeInOverviewWithTextFiltering
histogram.summary: The amount of time spent in overview mode when text filtering is used. The time is measured from the moment the windows begin animating to a thumbnail size preview to when a window is selected or selection is canceled. Only recorded if the text filtering textfield contains a non-empty string.

histogram.name: Ash.WorkspaceWindowResizer.TabDragging.PresentationTime.ClamshellMode
histogram.summary: Presentation time in ms when a tab is dragged in clamshell mode. Each time the tab is dragged within a display, the time it takes to present the new frame on screen is recorded.

histogram.name: Ash.WorkspaceWindowResizer.TabDragging.PresentationTime.MaxLatency.ClamshellMode
histogram.summary: Maximum presentation time recorded during the tab dragging session.

histogram.name: Assistant.ButtonClickCount
histogram.summary: The number of times buttons on Assistant UI (e.g., minimize) are clicked.

histogram.name: Assistant.ContainerView.Resize.AnimationSmoothness
histogram.summary: Relative animation smoothness of resizing assistant container window. 100% represents ideally smooth 60 frames per second. 50% represents when only 30 frames per second is achieved during the animations. 0% should not happen. This metric is recorded when the container window resizing is finished.

histogram.name: Assistant.ContextEnabledUserCount
histogram.summary: Among eligible users, whether the user has the Assistant context (related info) enabled. Recorded once for every UMA upload. The set of eligible users includes all users with profiles that can allow Assistant service to be enabled (AssistantAllowedState is limited by locale, policy, etc).

histogram.name: Assistant.DspHotwordDetection
histogram.summary: Counts the number of times Dsp hotword gets detected in each status, to help capture the hotword false acceptance rate.

histogram.name: Assistant.EntryPoint
histogram.summary: Record the Assistant entry point where Assistant UI becomes visible.

histogram.name: Assistant.ExitPoint
histogram.summary: Record the Assistant exit point where Assistant UI becomes invisible.

histogram.name: Assistant.HotwordEnableNotification
histogram.summary: Counts the number of times user click the hotword enable notification to open Assistant settings.

histogram.name: Assistant.OptInFlow.GetSettingsRequestTime
histogram.summary: Amount of time between get settings request and response. The request will be sent for each time the Assistant OptIn Flow is triggered to get string texts from the server.

histogram.name: Assistant.OptInFlow.LoadingTimeoutCount
histogram.summary: Number of times that the loading timeout triggers. The loading timeout is set by the Assistant OptIn Flow loading screen, which shows up during the server string texts and webviews are pending.

histogram.name: Assistant.OptInFlowStatus
histogram.summary: Record the status of the Assistant opt-in flow.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick
histogram.summary: Records a click on a proactive suggestions card by the user. This histogram is recorded for every click event while derivative metrics are recorded for splicing by category, index, and veId only when those respective attributes are known.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for a proactive suggestions card that was clicked by the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick.ByIndex
histogram.summary: Records the index for a proactive suggestions card within its list that was clicked by the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick.ByVeId
histogram.summary: Records the VE ID for a proactive suggestions card that was clicked by the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.FirstShowAttempt
histogram.summary: Records an attempt to show a proactive suggestion to the user for the first time.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.FirstShowAttempt.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for an attempt to show a proactive suggestion to the user for the first time.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.FirstShowResult
histogram.summary: Records a result of having shown a proactive suggestion to the user for the first time.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.FirstShowResult.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user for the first time.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.RequestResult
histogram.summary: Records a result for a proactive suggestions server request.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.RequestResult.Error
histogram.summary: Records a content category for a proactive suggestions server request that resulted in error.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.RequestResult.SuccessWithContent
histogram.summary: Records a content category for a proactive suggestions server request that resulted in a successful response containing content.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.RequestResult.SuccessWithoutContent
histogram.summary: Records a content category for a proactive suggestions server request that resulted in a successful response that did not contain content.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ReshowAttempt
histogram.summary: Records an attempt to reshow a proactive suggestion to the user that has already been seen.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ReshowAttempt.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for an attempt to reshow a proactive suggestion to the user that has already been seen.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ReshowResult
histogram.summary: Records a result of having reshown a proactive suggestion to the user that has already been seen.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ReshowResult.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having reshown a proactive suggestion to the user that has already been seen.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowAttempt
histogram.summary: Records an attempt to show a proactive suggestion to the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowAttempt.AbortedByDuplicateSuppression
histogram.summary: Records a content category for an attempt to show a proactive suggestion to the user that was aborted due to duplicate suppression.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowAttempt.Success
histogram.summary: Records a content category for an attempt to show a proactive suggestion to the user that was successful.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult
histogram.summary: Records a result of having shown a proactive suggestion to the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult.Click
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user that resulted in a click.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult.CloseByContextChange
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user that resulted in being closed due to a change in context.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult.CloseByTimeout
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user that resulted in being closed due to timeout.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult.CloseByUser
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user that resulted in being closed by the user.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ShowResult.Teleport
histogram.summary: Records a content category for having shown a proactive suggestion to the user that resulted in teleportation directly to a single result.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ViewImpression
histogram.summary: Records an impression of a proactive suggestions view seen by the user. This histogram is recorded for every impression event while derivative metrics are recorded for splicing by category and veId only when those respective attributes are known. Note that this histogram is primarily used with Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick to give an idea of CTR.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ViewImpression.ByCategory
histogram.summary: Records a content category for a proactive suggestions view that was seen by the user. Note that this histogram is primarily used with Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick.ByCategory to give an idea of CTR.

histogram.name: Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.ViewImpression.ByVeId
histogram.summary: Records the VE ID for a proactive suggestions view that was seen by the user. Note that this histogram is primarily used with Assistant.ProactiveSuggestions.CardClick.ByVeId to give an idea of CTR.

histogram.name: Assistant.QueryCountPerEntryPoint
histogram.summary: Number of queries fired for each entry point.

histogram.name: Assistant.QueryResponseType
histogram.summary: The Assistant query response type.

histogram.name: Assistant.QuerySource
histogram.summary: The source of Assistant query (e.g. dialog plate text field, voice input). Recorded when the query is committed.

histogram.name: Assistant.ServiceEnabledUserCount
histogram.summary: Among eligible users, whether the user has the Assistant service enabled. Recorded once for every UMA upload. The set of eligible users includes all users with profiles that can allow Assistant service to be enabled (AssistantAllowedState is limited by locale, policy, etc).

histogram.name: Assistant.ServiceReadyTime
histogram.summary: Amount of time between when the Assistant service is launched, and when the Assistant back-end signals it is ready to process queries.

histogram.name: Assistant.ServiceStartTime
histogram.summary: Amount of time spent in starting Assistant service.

histogram.name: Assistant.SetDspHotwordLocale
histogram.summary: For each attempt to set the hotword locale for a DSP device, counts whether the attempt succeeded.

histogram.name: Assistant.VoiceSearch.UserEligibility
histogram.summary: Tracks the eligibility of users for the voice search feature. Recorded when the user taps the voice search mic (ntp or location bar).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.AttemptCountFail
histogram.summary: Count of DnsAttempts before DnsTransaction completes with failure.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.AttemptCountSuccess
histogram.summary: Count of DnsAttempts before DnsTransaction completes successfully.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigChange
histogram.summary: Whether DnsConfigService::OnConfigChange actually corresponded to a change in DnsConfig.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigNotifyInterval
histogram.summary: Duration of time between calls to DnsConfigService::InvalidateConfig.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigParseDuration
histogram.summary: Duration of time spent parsing DnsConfig.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigParsePosix
histogram.summary: Counts of results of parsing DnsConfig in DnsConfigServicePosix.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigParseResult
histogram.summary: Whether DnsConfig was parsed successfully.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ConfigParseWin
histogram.summary: Counts of results of parsing DnsConfig in DnsConfigServiceWin.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.DNSChangerDetected
histogram.summary: Whether the first valid DnsConfig included a rogue nameserver.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.DnsClientDisabledReason
histogram.summary: Counts of specific error codes returned by DnsTask if a subsequent ProcTask succeeded, at the end of a streak of failures after which the DnsClient was disabled.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.DnsClientEnabled
histogram.summary: TRUE counts the events when a valid DnsConfig is received and used to enable DnsClient, while FALSE counts the events when DnsClient is disabled after a series of successful fallbacks from DnsTask to ProcTask.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.FallbackFail
histogram.summary: Duration of time spent by ProcTask in failing fallback resolutions.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.FallbackSuccess
histogram.summary: Duration of time spent by ProcTask in successful fallback resolutions.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HaveDnsConfig
histogram.summary: Whether there was a valid DNS configuration at the start of a job which eventually completed successfully.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostParseResult
histogram.summary: Whether DnsHosts were parsed successfully.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostsChange
histogram.summary: Whether DnsConfigService::OnHostsChange actually corresponded to a change in DnsHosts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostsNotifyInterval
histogram.summary: Duration of time between calls to DnsConfigService::InvalidateHosts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostsParseDuration
histogram.summary: Duration of time spent parsing DnsHosts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostsParseWin
histogram.summary: Counts of results of parsing DnsHosts in DnsConfigServiceWin.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.HostsSize
histogram.summary: The size of the HOSTS file observed before each attempt to parse it.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime_HIGHEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority HIGHEST when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime_IDLE
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority IDLE when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime_LOW
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOW when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime_LOWEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOWEST when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTime_MEDIUM
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority MEDIUM when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_HIGHEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority HIGHEST when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_IDLE
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority IDLE when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_LOW
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOW when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_LOWEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOWEST when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_MEDIUM
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (using DnsClient). Includes only Jobs which had priority MEDIUM when started.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.NameServersType
histogram.summary: Type of nameservers in the DNS config, recorded each time the config is read by the DNSConfigService.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ParseToAddressList
histogram.summary: Counts of results of parsing addresses out of DNS responses in successful DnsTransactions.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.PrefDefaultSource
histogram.summary: The source of the async DNS preference's default. Logged at startup, when the IO thread is created.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.PrefSource
histogram.summary: The source of the async DNS preference's value. Logged at startup, when the IO thread is created.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.Rcode
histogram.summary:
The DNS response rcode (https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-parameters/dns-parameters.xhtml#dns-parameters-6). Logged when a DnsTransaction finishes an attempt at a DNS record lookup. It may make multiple attempts - the rcode of each attempt will be logged. No logging will occur for attempts that do not obtain a response from a DNS server.
Only DNS record lookups performed by the internal DNS resolver ("AsyncDNS") will have their rcode logged. Lookups performed by the system resolver will not have their rcode logged.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveError
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskError.
histogram.summary: Counts of specific error codes returned by DnsTask if a subsequent ProcTask succeeded.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveFail
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsTask in resolutions that failed. Excludes time spent in the subsequent fallback.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveStatus
histogram.summary: Counts of the overall results of using asynchronous DNS in HostResolverImpl. This only includes jobs started with valid DNS configuration and excludes synchronous resolutions (as IP literals, from cache, and from HOSTS).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsTask in resolutions that succeeded.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_IPV4
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to pure IPv4 lookups.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_IPV6
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to pure IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_UNSPEC
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.DnsTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as AsyncDNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to IPv4/IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerCount
histogram.summary: Count of servers in DnsConfig. Recorded on every new DnsSession, which is created on DNS change.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerFailureIndex
histogram.summary: Index in DnsConfig of the failing server, recorded at the time of failure.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerFailuresAfterNetworkChange
histogram.summary: Count of server failures after network change before first success in the DnsSession. Recorded at the time of first success.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerFailuresAfterSuccess
histogram.summary: Count of server failures after success until the end of the session. Server has reported success at some point during the session. Recorded at the end of the DnsSession.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerFailuresBeforeSuccess
histogram.summary: Count of server failures before success. This is NOT the first success in the DnsSession. Recorded at the time of success.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerFailuresWithoutSuccess
histogram.summary: Count of server failures without success until the end of the session. Server has never reported success during the DnsSession. Recorded at the end of the DnsSession.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.ServerIsGood
histogram.summary: The current server is "good" and does not have to be skipped.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.SortFailure
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in failing calls to AddressSorter in dual-stack resolutions using DnsTask.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.SortSuccess
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in successful calls to AddressSorter in dual-stack resolutions using DnsTask.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.SuffixSearchDone
histogram.summary: The number of names from the search name list consumed during a successful transaction (QTYPE A only).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.SuffixSearchRemain
histogram.summary: The number of names left on the search name list at the end of a successful transaction (QTYPE A only).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.SuffixSearchStart
histogram.summary: The number of names on the search name list at the start of a transaction (QTYPE A only).

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TCPAttemptFail
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsTCPAttempt in failed attempts. Excludes timeouts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TCPAttemptSuccess
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsTCPAttempt in successful attempts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutErrorHistogram
histogram.summary: Difference between RTT and timeout calculated using Histogram algorithm.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutErrorHistogramUnder
histogram.summary: Difference between timeout calculated using Histogram algorithm and RTT.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutErrorJacobson
histogram.summary: Difference between RTT and timeout calculated using Jacobson algorithm.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutErrorJacobsonUnder
histogram.summary: Difference between timeout calculated using Jacobson algorithm and RTT.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutSpentHistogram
histogram.summary: Duration of time that would be spent waiting for lost request using Histogram algorithm.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TimeoutSpentJacobson
histogram.summary: Duration of time that would be spent waiting for lost request using Jacobson algorithm.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TotalTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.TotalTime.
histogram.summary: Duration of time since a HostResolverImpl::Resolve request to the time a result is posted. Excludes canceled, evicted, and aborted requests. Includes cache hits (recorded as 0). Excludes speculative requests.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TotalTime_speculative
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.TotalTime_speculative.
histogram.summary: Duration of time since a HostResolverImpl::Resolve request to the time a result is posted. Excludes canceled, evicted, and aborted requests. Includes cache hits (recorded as 0). Speculative requests only.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TransactionFailure
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in failing DnsTransactions. This includes server failures, timeouts and NXDOMAIN results.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TransactionSuccess
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in successful DnsTransactions. This includes all NOERROR answers, even if they indicate the name has no addresses or they cannot be parsed.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TransactionSuccess_A
histogram.summary: Same as AsyncDNS.TransactionSuccess but limited to A query type.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TransactionSuccess_AAAA
histogram.summary: Same as AsyncDNS.TransactionSuccess but limited to AAAA query type.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.TTL
histogram.summary: TTL of the resolved addresses, as in the response received from the server. For results served from local cache, the TTL is from the original response.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.UDPAttemptFail
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsUDPAttempt in failed attempts. Excludes timeouts.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.UDPAttemptSuccess
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken by DnsUDPAttempt in successful attempts. Includes responses arriving after timeout, if multiple attempts are allowed.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.UnchangedConfigInterval
histogram.summary: Duration of time since the last empty config result to the time a non-change OnConfigChange is received.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.UnchangedHostsInterval
histogram.summary: Duration of time since the last empty config result to the time a non-change OnHostsChange is received.

histogram.name: AsyncDNS.WatchStatus
histogram.summary: The result of DnsConfigService watch. Counts STARTED on every initialization and FAILED_* on any failure.

histogram.name: Aura.CreatedGpuBrowserCompositor
histogram.summary: Whether the browser compositor uses GPU or the software renderer.

histogram.name: Aura.WebContentsWindowUnOccludedTime
histogram.summary: The amount of time spent painting a WebContents frame when a window switches from occluded to visible state.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfAuthenticateUser
histogram.summary: Result from an attempt to authenticate a user to an Active Directory domain.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfAutoMachinePasswordChange
histogram.summary: Result from automatic background machine password renewal.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfAutoTgtRenewal
histogram.summary: Result from automatic background ticket-granting-ticket renewal.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfGetUserKerberosFiles
histogram.summary: Result of an attempt to get an Active Directory user's Kerberos ticket-granting-ticket and configuration data.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfGetUserStatus
histogram.summary: Result of an attempt to get the status of an Active Directory user's Kerberos ticket, password and account.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfJoinADDomain
histogram.summary: Result from an attempt to join a machine to an Active Directory domain.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfRefreshDevicePolicy
histogram.summary: Result from an attempt to fetch device policy from an Active Directory domain and store it on disk.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.ErrorTypeOfRefreshUserPolicy
histogram.summary: Result from an attempt to fetch user policy from an Active Directory domain and store it on disk.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.FailedTriesOfKinit
histogram.summary: Number of times 'kinit' failed until the next try succeeded or the method gave up because a maximum number of tries was exceeded. 'kinit' is run for Active Directory enrolled devices during user authentication and device policy fetch.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.FailedTriesOfSmbClient
histogram.summary: Number of times 'smbclient' failed until it the next try succeeded or the method gave up because a maximum number of tries was exceeded. 'smbclient' is run for Active Directory enrolled devices during policy fetch.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.KerberosEncryptionTypes.AuthenticateUser
histogram.summary: The Kerberos encryption types used while succesfully authenticating an user. This value comes from the DeviceKerberosEncryptionTypes policy.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.KerberosEncryptionTypes.JoinADDomain
histogram.summary: The Kerberos encryption types used while succesfully joining an Active Directory domain. This value comes from the advanced settings of the domainjoin screen.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.NumGposToDownload
histogram.summary: Number of group policy objects attached to a specific user or machine on an Active Directory domain. This value is recorded when user or device policy is fetched from an Active Directory server.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToAuthenticateUser
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to authenticate a user to an Active Directory domain. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToGetUserKerberosFiles
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to get the Kerberos ticket-granting-ticket and configuration data of an Active Directory user. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToGetUserStatus
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to get status information of an Active Directory user. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToJoinADDomain
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to join a machine to an Active Directory domain. Domain join is part of the Active Directory enrollment process. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRefreshDevicePolicy
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to fetch device policy from an Active Directory domain and store it on disk. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRefreshUserPolicy
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to fetch user policy from an Active Directory domain and store it on disk. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunKinit
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'kinit' (request Kerberos ticket-granting- ticket). TGTs are requested regularly for accessing services on Active Directory domains. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunKlist
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'klist' (print Kerberos ticket-granting-ticket information). The command reveals a TGT's lifetime, which is used to determine TGT status in GetUserStatus() called periodically by Chrome. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunKpasswd
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'kpasswd' (change Active Directory password). The command is used to change the machine account password. By default, it is run every 30 days by the AuthPolicy daemon. The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunNetAdsGpo
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'net ads gpo list' (list Active Directory group policy objects). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunNetAdsInfo
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'net ads info' (query Active Directory information). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunNetAdsJoin
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'net ads join' (join machine to an Active Directory domain). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunNetAdsSearch
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'net ads search' (query information about an Active Directory account). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunNetAdsWorkgroup
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'net ads workgroup' (query Active Directory workgroup). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: AuthPolicy.TimeToRunSmbclient
histogram.summary: Time in milliseconds to call 'smbclient' (download policy from an Active Directory domain). The value is recorded no matter if the operation was successful or not.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.Bubble
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the frequency of user interactions with the Autocheckout bubble, which prompts users to invoke Autocheckout on supported websites.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.BuyFlow
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the frequency of final states reached in Autocheckout buy flow.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.DismissalState
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The state of the Autocheckout dialog when it was dismissed.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.FlowDuration
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user submitted the Autocheckout dialog and when the Autocheckout flow, or filling process, concluded.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.FlowDuration.Failed
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user submitted the Autocheckout dialog and when the Autocheckout flow concluded, in cases where the flow failed.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.FlowDuration.Succeeded
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user submitted the Autocheckout dialog and when the Autocheckout flow concluded, in cases where the flow succeeded.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.InitialUserState
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The initial state of a user that's interacting with a freshly shown Autocheckout dialog.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.PopupInDialog
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: User interactions with the Autofill popup shown while filling an Autocheckout dialog.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.Security
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the frequency of security warnings and errors in the Autocheckout dialog.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.UiDuration
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the duration for which an Autocheckout dialog was shown.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.UiDuration.Cancel
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the duration for which an Autocheckout dialog was shown, in cases where the user ended up canceling out of the dialog.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.UiDuration.Submit
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the duration for which an Autocheckout dialog was shown, in cases where the user ended up accepting the dialog.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.UiEvents
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures how users are interacting with the Autocheckout dialog UI.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.UiLatencyToShow
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the duration of time it takes for the Autocheckout UI to be actionable by the user after it is shown.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.WalletErrors
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the frequency of errors in communicating with the Google Online Wallet server.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.WalletRequiredActions
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the frequency of required user actions returned by the Google Online Wallet server.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.WhitelistDownloadDuration
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures time taken to download the Autocheckout whitelist file.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.WhitelistDownloadDuration.Failed
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures time taken to download the Autocheckout whitelist file in case the download was failed.

histogram.name: Autocheckout.WhitelistDownloadDuration.Succeeded
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures time taken to download the Autocheckout whitelist file in case the download was succeeded.

histogram.name: Autocomplete.Cleanup
histogram.summary: Logged when the Autocomplete Retention Policy cleaned up expired entries. Expired entries are entries that haven't been used in the last 14 months.

histogram.name: Autocomplete.DaysSinceLastUse
histogram.summary: Logged when users select Autocomplete entries in the dropdown, this histogram captures the number of days that have passed since the selected autocomplete entry was last used. I.e., the distribution of time between uses of an "active" autocomplete entry.

histogram.name: Autocomplete.Events
histogram.summary: Autocomplete events recorded when the user interacts with suggestions served from Autocomplete.

histogram.name: Autocomplete.MatchType
histogram.summary: Type of AutocompleteMatch. Recorded every time the autocomplete action predictor in omnibox triggers a preresolve, or a preconnect.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.AccurateCount
histogram.summary: Every time we calculate the confidence for a URL to determine if it should be prerendered, we track the URL and confidence calculated. When an Omnibox navigation happens, if we calculated a confidence for that URL, a count is incremented for the confidence that was calculated. This histogram is then a histogram of counts that relates the number of correctly predicted URLs to a confidence value. By comparing that number to the AutocompleteActionPredictor.NavigationCount and Prerender.OmniboxNavigationsUsedPrerenderCount histograms, it's possible to determine the effect of changing the confidence threshold on the accuracy of prerendering prediction.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.Action
histogram.summary: The distribution of network actions recommended by the AutocompleteActionPredictor. A network action can be one of the enumerated AutocompleteActionPredictor::Action values: PRERENDER, PRECONNECT, or NONE. The AutocompleteActionPredictor recommends one of these based on a confidence score for a given URL and user-entered text pair.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.Confidence
histogram.summary: The distribution of confidence ratings. The AutocompleteActionPredictor uses a heuristic to calculate a confidence score given a URL and user-entered text pair. It is in the range [0,1] and is mapped on to a recommended action, one of the enumerated AutocompleteActionPredictor::Action values: PRERENDER, PRECONNECT or NONE. This is the distribution of those scores multiplied by 100.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.DatabaseAction
histogram.summary: Trackes the number of times something is added, removed, or deleted from the AutocompleteActionPredictor backing database.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.DatabaseRowCount
histogram.summary: The distribution of row counts for the AutocompleteActionPredictorDatabase. Each row contains information regarding the user's Omnibox use history.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.MatchIsInDb
histogram.summary: A boolean that indicates if the autocomplete suggestion under consideration by the AutocompleteActionPredictor was found in the database. This gives an upper bound on the fraction of suggestions it is possible to calculate a confidence for, and thus an upper bound on the fraction of suggestions that can be prerendered.

histogram.name: AutocompleteActionPredictor.NavigationCount
histogram.summary: The number of navigations triggered by the Omnibox and seen by the AutocompleteActionPredictor. This triggers when the Omnibox is showing Autocomplete results to the user and they select one with the mouse or by pressing enter.

histogram.name: AutodetectEncoding.Attempted
histogram.summary:
Whether the text encoding auto detection logic was attempted for a web page. The logic is triggered when the parser fails to find the encoding method from other signals such as http header, meta tag, BOM, etc.
If the logic successfully detects a new encoding method which is different from the default one, the result is reported through AutodetectEncoding.Detected with the encoding method (see below). Otherwise - i.e. detection logic somehow fails to work for the page or the detected one is same as the default - no result is reported.

histogram.name: AutodetectEncoding.Detected
histogram.summary: The number of web pages whose encoding method is found by the auto detection logic. Grouped by the encoding methods defined in EncodingMethod.

histogram.name: Autofill.Address.IsEnabled.PageLoad
histogram.summary: Tracks whether Profile (Address) Autofill is enabled on page load for a page containing forms.

histogram.name: Autofill.Address.IsEnabled.Startup
histogram.summary: Tracks whether Profile (Address) Autofill is enabled when Chrome launches.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressBook.AccessSkipped
histogram.summary: Whether an attempt to access the Mac AddressBook was skipped because doing so would incorrectly cause the appearance of the permissions dialog. This happens when Chrome auto-update changes the binary on disk before the first AddressBook access attempt.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressBookAvailable
histogram.summary: Whether the Mac AddressBook was available on an attempt to read data from it.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressBookAvailableOnFirstAttempt
histogram.summary: Whether the Mac AddressBook was available on the *first* attempt to read data from it. This is only recorded once per Chrome profile.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressesDeletedForDisuse
histogram.summary: The number of unverified autofill addresses deleted because they have not been used for a long time, and are not used as billing addresses of valid credit cards. Note the deletion only happens once per major version upgrade.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressesSuppressedForDisuse
histogram.summary: The number of address suggestions not shown in the Autofill popup because they have not been used recently enough. Note that suppression only applies when the user has not typed any text into the field. If any text is in the field, all matching addresses are displayed, regardless of how recently they have been used.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressProfileImportCountrySpecificFieldRequirements
histogram.summary: Each country can require different fields (ZIP code, state, city) to exist for an address to be valid. This histogram logs which mandatory fields were missing in a submitted address form.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressProfileImportRequirements
histogram.summary: Logs whether the individual requirements for importing an address profile are met at form submission time.

histogram.name: Autofill.AddressSuggestionsCount
histogram.summary: The number of address suggestions shown in the Autofill popup.

histogram.name: Autofill.AutocompleteEnabled
histogram.summary: Whether autocomplete is enabled.

histogram.name: Autofill.AutocompleteQuery
histogram.summary: Whether an autocomplete query is created for a field.

histogram.name: Autofill.AutocompleteSuggestions
histogram.summary: Whether there is any suggestions for an autocomplete query.

histogram.name: Autofill.AutomaticProfileCreation
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 6/2015, replaced by Autofill.ProfileActionOnFormSubmitted.
histogram.summary: Whether a new Autofill profile was created automatically. In the "false" case, an existing profile was used (and possibly updated).

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.CardUnmaskDuration.Fido
histogram.summary: Tracks the time it takes to fetch the full PAN of a credit card once user successfully authenticates using WebAuthn.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.CardUnmaskPreflightCalled
histogram.summary:
Tracks the number of times Chrome made a GetDetailsForGetRealPan call. A preflight call is only made when card suggestions are shown, and can only happen when the user has server cards and is eligible for WebAuthn.
As a percentage of the number of times card suggestions are shown, which is tracked under Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard, this metric provides an estimate for the potential reach for the Autofill Better Auth project. Moreover, this acts as a baseline value for other metrics in this project.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.CardUnmaskPreflightDuration
histogram.summary: Tracking the latency of a GetDetailsForGetRealPan call to Payments servers. This duration should be comparable to that of Autofill.UnmaskPrompt.Duration and should ideally stay under 500 ms in order for the user to autofill their credit card without experiencing much friction.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.CardUnmaskTypeDecision
histogram.summary: If the user is definitely opted-in to the new auth flow, Payments sends a list of instrument IDs in the GDFGRP call, and Chrome makes the final call on whether CVC or WebAuthn should be shown. Tracks which authentication method was prompted.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.FlowEvents
histogram.summary: Tracks when a user completes each step in a card unmasking flow per authentication type. This will provide a relative conversion rate for each authentication type.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.OptInCalled
histogram.summary: Tracks when users opt-in either from the settings page or from a checkout flow, making an UpdateAutofillUserPreference call. For each call to payments, logs if the call was made in order to verify an existing credential, to create a new credential, or to fetch a challenge.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.OptInPromoShown
histogram.summary:
Logs the number of times the opt-in promo to use FIDO authentication for card unmasking has been shown. Only applicable on Desktop.
This is useful when compared to Autofill.BetterAuth.OptInPromoUserDecision, to see what percentage of users are interacting with the dialog. Also, when an opted-out user receives the preflight call before selecting a card (which is recorded by the first bucket in Autofill.BetterAuth.UserPerceivedLatencyOnCardSelection.OptedOut), then the promo should eventually show if the user selects a masked card and successfully authenticates through CVC.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.OptInPromoUserDecision
histogram.summary: Tracks the user response to the opt-in promo for using FIDO authentication for card unmasking. The user can either accept the promo and proceed to perform user-verification, can decline the promo immediately, or first accept the promo but then decline while the challenge is being fetched. Only applicable on Desktop.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.OptOutCalled.FromSettingsPage
histogram.summary:
Tracks the number of times UpdateAutofillUserPreference has been called with the intention of opting out from FIDO authentication using the toggle switch on the payments section on the settings page.
This will be useful when compared to values in Autofill.BetterAuth.OptInCalled to give an idea of what percentage of users decide to opt-out.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.UserPerceivedLatencyOnCardSelection
histogram.summary: The GetDetailsForGetRealPan call is made when card suggestions are shown. This metric tracks whether the response is received before or after a card is chosen by the user. For an opted-in user, a late response would imply perceived latency. For an opted-out user, a late response would imply that opt-in may not have been offered.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.UserPerceivedLatencyOnCardSelection.OptedIn.Duration
histogram.summary: The GetDetailsForGetRealPan call is made when card suggestions are shown. This metric logs the duration of the perceived latency when the response for this call is received after a card is chosen by an opted-in user. After waiting a set number of seconds without receiving a response, Chrome will fall back to CVC authentication.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.UserPerceivedLatencyOnCardSelection.OptedIn.TimedOutCvcFallback
histogram.summary: The GetDetailsForGetRealPan call is made when card suggestions are shown. If an opted-in user selects a card before the response is returned, latency is perceived. Given that the user perceives latency, this metric logs whether the request timed out and fell back to CVC or if the request was completed and continued to WebAuthn.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.UserVerifiabilityCheckDuration
histogram.summary: Tracks how long it takes to check that the user is verifiable through WebAuthn's IsUserVerifiablePlatformAuthenticatorAvailable() call. This check is done before deciding to make a GetDetailsForGetRealPan call to Payments.

histogram.name: Autofill.BetterAuth.WebauthnResult
histogram.summary: This metric tracks the result of the WebAuthn prompt when the user attempts to either opt-in for FIDO authentication or unmask a card using FIDO authentication.

histogram.name: Autofill.CanLogUKM
histogram.summary: Tracks whether UKM logging is enabled for the page in the Autofill.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardholderNameFixFlowPrompt.Events
histogram.summary: Events tracking the usage of the cardholder name fix flow prompt. This prompt is triggered whenever cardholder name must be explicitly requested from the user in order to upload the card to Google Payments.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardUnmask.CvcLength
histogram.summary: Records the length of CVCs sent to Payments when making card unmask calls, to help determine if blank or invalid length CVCs are being sent.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardUploadDecision
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 2/2016, replaced by Autofill.CardUploadDecisionMetric.
histogram.summary: Whether upload was offered upon detecting a form submission with credit card data and a reason if it wasn't.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardUploadDecisionExpanded
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 5/2017, replaced by Autofill.CardUploadDecisionMetric.
histogram.summary: Whether upload was offered upon detecting a form submission with credit card data and a detailed reason if it wasn't.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardUploadDecisionMetric
histogram.summary: Whether upload was offered upon detecting a form submission with credit card data, a detailed reason if upload was offered even with some missing fields and detailed reasons if it wasn't.

histogram.name: Autofill.CardUploadEnabled
histogram.summary: Detailed reasons why (or why not) card upload was enabled. When a user submits a form, this check is triggered to decide whether to ask the user if she wants to upload the card.

histogram.name: AutoFill.CCInfoBarAccepted
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 3/2011, replaced by Autofill.CreditCardInfoBar.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The Autofill credit card info bar was accepted.

histogram.name: AutoFill.CCInfoBarDenied
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 3/2011, replaced by Autofill.CreditCardInfoBar.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The Autofill credit card info bar was denied.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCard.IsEnabled.PageLoad
histogram.summary: Tracks whether Credit Card Autofill is enabled on page load for a page containing forms.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCard.IsEnabled.Startup
histogram.summary: Tracks whether Credit Card Autofill is enabled when Chrome launches.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardFillingInfoBar
histogram.summary: The relative frequency with which users accept, deny, or ignore the Autofill credit card assisted filling infobar prompt.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardInfoBar
histogram.summary: The relative frequency with which users accept, deny, or ignore the Autofill credit card info bar prompt.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardsDeletedForDisuse
histogram.summary: The number of credit card deleted during a major version upgrade because they have not been used recently enough and are expired.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardsSuppressedForDisuse
histogram.summary: The number of credit card suggestions not shown in the Autofill popup because they have not been used recently enough and are expired. Note that suppression only applies when the user has not typed any text into the field. If any text is in the field, all matching cards are displayed, regardless of how recently they have been used and their expiration status.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardUploadDisallowedForNetwork
histogram.obsolete: Was replaced by the AutofillDoNotUploadSaveUnsupportedCards feature in M75. Removed 2019/07.
histogram.summary: When a credit card is not allowed to be offered upload save due to its network, logs what the card network was.

histogram.name: Autofill.CreditCardUploadFeedback
histogram.summary: Records when credit card upload provides feedback on its status to the user.

histogram.name: Autofill.DaysSinceLastUse.CreditCard
histogram.summary: Logs the number of days that have passed since the credit card was last used.

histogram.name: Autofill.DaysSinceLastUse.Profile
histogram.summary: Logged at the time of autofill address use, this histogram captures the number of days that have passed since the address was last used. I.e., the distribution of time between uses of an "active" autofill address.

histogram.name: Autofill.DaysSinceLastUse.StoredCreditCard
histogram.summary: Logs the number of days that have passed since each credit card belonging to a given Chrome Profile was last used. This is logged for each Autofill credit card once per Chrome User Profile load.

histogram.name: Autofill.DaysSinceLastUse.StoredProfile
histogram.summary: This histogram captures the number of days that have passed since each stored address profile belonging to a given Chrome Profile was last used. This is logged for each Autofill address profile once per Chrome User Profile load.

histogram.name: Autofill.DaysSincePreviousUseAtSubmission.Profile
histogram.summary: Logs the number of days between most recent use without modification and the penultimate use of the profile when submitting a credit card form.

histogram.name: Autofill.DeveloperEngagement
histogram.summary: Measures the adoption of the HTML autocomplete type hint specification (see http://is.gd/whatwg_autocomplete for more details). For each fillable form detected, logs whether that form includes author-specified type hints.

histogram.name: Autofill.ExpirationDateFixFlowPrompt.Events
histogram.summary: Events tracking the usage of the expiration date fix flow prompt. This prompt is triggered whenever expiration date must be explicitly requested from the user in order to upload the card to Google Payments.

histogram.name: Autofill.ExpirationDateFixFlowPromptShown
histogram.summary: The number of times the expiration date fix flow prompt is shown.

histogram.name: Autofill.FieldCount
histogram.summary: Number of fields in a form that Autofill encounters.

histogram.name: Autofill.FieldPrediction
histogram.summary: Predicted and actual form field type. This is a computed sparse histogram where the value is ((predicted << 16)| actual). Predicted and actual are taken from the autofill::ServerFieldType enumeration.

histogram.name: Autofill.FieldPredictionQuality.Aggregate
histogram.summary: Aggregate Autofill field-type prediction outcomes. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Confusion_matrix for an explanation of the values.

histogram.name: Autofill.FieldPredictionQuality.ByFieldType
histogram.summary: Autofill field-type prediction outcomes, broken down by field type. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Confusion_matrix for an explanation of the values.

histogram.name: Autofill.FillDuration.FromInteraction.WithAutofill
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the user's first interaction with a form and the form's submission, for an autofilled form.

histogram.name: Autofill.FillDuration.FromInteraction.WithoutAutofill
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the user's first interaction with a form and the form's submission, for a non-autofilled form.

histogram.name: Autofill.FillDuration.FromLoad.WithAutofill
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between form load and form submission, for an autofilled form.

histogram.name: Autofill.FillDuration.FromLoad.WithoutAutofill
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between form load and form submission, for a non-autofilled form.

histogram.name: Autofill.FormDynamicity
histogram.summary: Records how forms change dynamically: whether the form signature changed, a field's signature changed, or a field was newly created. The reference period starts when Autofill parses the form for the first time, and ends when a navigation is committed or the frame is destructed.
histogram.details: Every form is observed for dynamic changes from the time it was first parsed by Autofill until either a navigation has been committed or the frame is destructed or the form's observation had to be flushed prematurely (the form observations are managed in an LRU cache of maximum size 32, with least recently parsed forms being discarded first). At the end of the lifetime, a three-bit number is sent: the lowest bit is 1 iff a field was changed during the form's lifetime (its signature changed); the second bit is 1 iff a field was added (its renderer ID is new to the form); the highest bit is 1 iff the form was changed (its signature changed).

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.Address
histogram.summary: Autofill form events for address forms. These are recorded when the user interacts with a form requesting an address.
histogram.details: Important caveat about submission metrics: - Submission using autofill data is determined by simply evaluating if there was a fill operation in this page. So, if the user filled with local data, completed erased or modified the data after and then submitted, we would only emit one "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)"; - The submission segmentation works by checking what kind of data was last filled for this type of form in the page load. So, if a user initially filled with local data and after that filled with server, we will only emit "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)".

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard
histogram.summary: Autofill form events for credit card forms. These are recorded when the user interacts with a form requesting a credit card.
histogram.details: Important caveat about submission metrics: - Submission using autofill data is determined by simply evaluating if there was a fill operation in this page. So, if the user filled with local data, completed erased or modified the data after and then submitted, we would only emit one "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)"; - The submission segmentation works by checking what kind of data was last filled for this type of form in the page load. So, if a user initially filled with local data and after that filled with server, we will only emit "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)".

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard.BankNameDisplayed
histogram.summary: Autofill form events for credit card forms. These are recorded when the user interacts with a form requesting a credit card, a dropdown of suggestions is shown and at least one of the suggestions has a bank name. Form events are logged at most once per page load.
histogram.details: These metrics are used to measure the impact of the bank name experiment. They are used to calculate the CTR of the autofill UI with bank names available. Not all credit cards will have bank names even if we launch the experiment. With these metrics we can run the experiment on 2 groups. For one group, we will show bank names if available. For the other, we won't shown.

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard.OnNonsecurePage
histogram.summary: Autofill form events for credit card forms on nonsecure pages. These are recorded when the user interacts with a form requesting a credit card.
histogram.details: Important caveat about submission metrics: - Submission using autofill data is determined by simply evaluating if there was a fill operation in this page. So, if the user filled with local data, completed erased or modified the data after and then submitted, we would only emit one "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)"; - The submission segmentation works by checking what kind of data was last filled for this type of form in the page load. So, if a user initially filled with local data and after that filled with server, we will only emit "Submitted with server suggestion filled (once)".

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard.WithServerNickname
histogram.summary: Autofill form events for credit card forms. These are recorded when the user interacts with a form requesting a credit card, a dropdown of suggestions is shown and at least one of the suggestions has a server nickname available.
histogram.details: These metrics are used to measure the impact of the server card nickname experiment. They are used to calculate the suggestion selection rate with server nickname available. We will run the experiment on the same group of user who has server cards with nicknames to compare the selection rate. For enabled user, we will show nickname and log. For the other, we won't show nickname in suggestion but we still log to this histogram.

histogram.name: Autofill.FormEvents.CreditCard.WithServerNickname.SelectionDuration
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between when the first Autofill suggestion is shown and user first chooses a card, for a credit card form, where the user has at least one card with a server nickname available. Log only once per form. We will run the experiment on the same group of user who have server cards with nicknames to compare the selection duration. For enabled user, we will show nickname and log. For the other, we won't show nickname in suggestion but we still log to this histogram.

histogram.name: Autofill.FormSubmittedState
histogram.summary: The autofill state related to a submitted form.

histogram.name: Autofill.Funnel.FillAfterSuggestion
histogram.summary:
Counts whether users accepted any autofill suggestion that was shown to them for a given form.
This metric is only recorded if a suggestion for the given form type (see histogram name) was shown at least once. This is recorded once per form. If the user accepts one suggestion, this is reported as "User chose to fill" once. It does not matter if the user clears the filled values nor if the user accepts a different suggestion later.

histogram.name: Autofill.Funnel.InteractionAfterParsedAsType
histogram.summary:
Counts whether users interacted with a form of a certain type.
Focusing a field is sufficient to consider a form as being interacted with. The user does not need to type anything. Note that some forms may get focused on page load.
This metric is recorded once per form observed by Autofill, but only for forms that Autofill classifies to be of the type indicated by the histogram name. If a form changes dynamically, Autofill interprets the forms before and after the change as two different forms and records two values. If a form did not have features that classify it as a form of a certain type (e.g. an address form or payment form), then nothing is recorded.

histogram.name: Autofill.Funnel.ParsedAsType
histogram.summary:
Counts whether a form was parsed/interpreted to be of the type indicated in the histogram name.
This metric is recorded once for each form observed by Autofill. If a form changes dynamically, then Autofill treats the different versions of the form as different forms.

histogram.name: Autofill.Funnel.SubmissionAfterFill
histogram.summary:
Counts whether users submitted a form that was filled via autofill.
This metric is recorded once for each form observed by Autofill but only for forms that the user filled via Autofill.

histogram.name: Autofill.Funnel.SuggestionAfterInteraction
histogram.summary:
Counts whether users were shown suggestions to fill the form, given that they have already interacted with the form.
This metric is recorded only for forms that users interacted with. It is recorded only once per form, meaning that it does not matter how often the user sees suggestions. If a form changes dynamically, then Autofill treats the different versions of the form as different forms.

histogram.name: Autofill.HadUserOptedIn_To_WalletSyncTransportServerCards
histogram.summary: Whether the user had opted-in to seeing their server cards in Wallet Sync Transport mode. Recorded when showing the autofill dropdown for credit cards.

histogram.name: Autofill.HasModifiedProfile.CreditCardFormSubmission
histogram.summary: Whether user modified an address profile shortly before submitting a credit card form.

histogram.name: Autofill.HiddenOrPresentationalSelectFieldsFilled
histogram.summary: Logs when a hidden or presentational field is autofilled. The hidden or presentational fields are only autofilled for 'select' fields to support synthetic fields.

histogram.name: Autofill.IcuCollatorCreationSuccess
histogram.summary: Tracks whether Autofill was able to create the ICU collator successfully.

histogram.name: Autofill.InvalidProfileData.UsedForMetrics
histogram.summary: Tracks whether or not autofill suppressed sending votes or calculating quality metrics because the profile data was marked as invalid. Logged during field-type validation if/when a field marked as invalid is found to match the submitted data.

histogram.name: Autofill.InvalidProfileData.UsedForSuggestion
histogram.summary: Tracks whether or not autofill suppressed offering an autofill suggestion because the profile data was marked as invalid. Logged during autofill suggestion generation when a suggestion is about to generated based on a field marked as invalid.

histogram.name: Autofill.IsEnabled.PageLoad
histogram.summary: This includes Autofill.Address.IsEnabled.PageLoad and Autofill.CreditCard.IsEnabled.PageLoad, and tracks whether either profile Autofill or payment Autofill is enabled on page load for a page containing forms. It helps deduce the overlap by showing what percentage of users have one type of Autofill enabled but not the other.

histogram.name: Autofill.IsEnabled.Startup
histogram.summary: This includes Autofill.Address.IsEnabled.Startup and Autofill.CreditCard.IsEnabled.Startup, and tracks whether either profile Autofill or payment Autofill is enabled when Chrome launches. It helps deduce the overlap by showing what percentage of users have one type of Autofill enabled but not the other.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyboardAccessoryButtonsIOS_ScreenReaderOff
histogram.summary: [iOS] Measures the frequency of button presses on the iOS Autofill keyboard accessory view when VoiceOver is off.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyboardAccessoryButtonsIOS_ScreenReaderOn
histogram.summary: [iOS] Measures the frequency of button presses on the iOS Autofill keyboard accessory view when VoiceOver is on.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FillingAcceptance
histogram.summary: Counts for submitted forms whether users accepted the suggestion to fill values. This is counted as 'yes' if the user accepted such a suggestion at any time, regardless whether other suggestions were ignored or whether the accepted suggestion was reverted afterwards.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FillingAssistance
histogram.summary:
Counts for submitted forms whether the user filled any fields via Autofill.
If the user reverts the filling, the form is still counted as filled.
This metric is different from Autofill.KeyMetrics.FillingAcceptance in the sense that the latter is only recorded if the user has actually seen a prompt to fill data.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FillingCorrectness
histogram.summary: Counts for submitted and autofilled forms whether users edited at least one filled value before submitting the form.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FillingReadiness
histogram.summary:
Counts for submitted forms whether Chromium had any address or payments data to fill.
It does not matter whether the user actually requested to fill the data. It does not matter either whether the data available for filling corresponded to the submitted data.

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FormSubmission.Autofilled
histogram.summary:
Counts for filled (by Autofill) forms whether users submitted those forms.
This is only recorded for forms that the user filled via Autofill. It does not matter if the user reverted the filling afterwards.
This is recorded once Autofill stops tracking the form (e.g. due to a navigation or due to removal from the DOM).

histogram.name: Autofill.KeyMetrics.FormSubmission.NotAutofilled
histogram.summary:
Counts for not filled (by Autofill) forms whether users submitted those forms.
This is only recorded for forms into which the user typed anything but did not fill anything. It does not matter if the user reverted what they typed.
This is recorded once Autofill stops tracking the form (e.g. due to a navigation or due to removal from the DOM).

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationBubbleOffer
histogram.summary: Record events related to bubble showing. Logged when bubble is requested or is actually shown to users.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationBubbleResult
histogram.summary: Records whether and how the local card migration bubble was accepted or closed.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationBubbleUserInteraction
histogram.summary: Record how bubble is closed by different user interactions.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationDecision
histogram.summary: Record the decisions made when determining if local card migration should be offered.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationDialogActiveDuration
histogram.summary: Record duration of the local card migration dialog being visible to users.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationDialogOffer
histogram.summary: Record events related to showing the local card migration dialog.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationDialogUserInteraction
histogram.summary: Record user interactions related to local card migration dialog.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationDialogUserSelectionPercentage
histogram.summary: Record the percentage of cards selected by the user in the migration dialog.

histogram.name: Autofill.LocalCardMigrationOrigin
histogram.summary: Records when local card migration prompts are shown and/or accepted.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook
histogram.summary: When Chrome tries to access the user's Address Book, OSX presents a blocking dialog which disrupts the user experience. A new Chrome feature has been introduced wherein Chrome only shows this blocking dialog if the user explicitly asked Chrome to access the user's Address Book. If a form's field looks like it might support Autofill suggestions from the user's Address Book and there are no other suggestions, Chrome shows an Autofill entry that prompts the user to give Chrome access to the user's Address Book. This histogram tracks the frequency that this Autofill entry is presented, and the frequency that this Autofill entry is selected.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.AcceptedSuggestionIsFromAddressBook
histogram.summary: This metric is emitted each time the user accepts an Autofill suggestion. It records whether the result is from the Address Book.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.AccessTime
histogram.summary: The amount of time spent accessing the OSX Address Book the first time after Chrome was launched. If this time is larger than ~100ms, this it is likely that the user was shown a blocking, modal dialog.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.ContainedMeCard
histogram.summary: After a Chrome is given access to the Mac Address Book, whether the Address Book contained a Me card.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.MeCard.HadAddress
histogram.summary: When Chrome is given access to the Me Card of the Address Book, whether the card has an address that contained a street number and either a city or zip code.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.MeCard.HadEmail
histogram.summary: When Chrome is given access to the Me Card of the Address Book, whether the card has an email.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.MeCard.HadName
histogram.summary: When Chrome is given access to the Me Card of the Address Book, whether the card has a name.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.MeCard.HadPhoneNumber
histogram.summary: When Chrome is given access to the Me Card of the Address Book, whether the card has a phone number.

histogram.name: Autofill.MacAddressBook.NumShowsBeforeSelected
histogram.summary: The number of times that the access Address Book prompt has been shown when the user selects the prompt.

histogram.name: Autofill.ManageCardsPrompt
histogram.summary: The frequency of user interactions with the Manage Cards prompt.

histogram.name: Autofill.MaskedCardComparisonNetworksMatch
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 12/2019. The comparison found that Chrome and Payments correctly matched 99.9% of the time.
histogram.summary: This metric is recorded when two credit cards are compared using CreditCard::HasSameNumberAs and one of the cards in the comparison is masked. The metric measures whether there is a match between a masked card's network and the network of the card with which the masked card is being compared.

histogram.name: Autofill.MigrateUserOptedInToWalletSync
histogram.summary: This metric is recorded when the bit that indicates the user is opted in to wallet sync transport is migrated (part of the migration from using email to using Gaia ID as the account identifier).

histogram.name: Autofill.NumberOfEditedAutofilledFieldsAtSubmission
histogram.summary: The number of autofilled fields that were subsequently edited prior to the form being submitted.

histogram.name: Autofill.NumberOfProfilesConsideredForDedupe
histogram.summary: The number of Autofill profiles that have been considered for deduplication.

histogram.name: Autofill.NumberOfProfilesRemovedDuringDedupe
histogram.summary: The number of Autofill profiles that have been removed during deduplication.

histogram.name: Autofill.NumElementsMatchesNumFields
histogram.summary: Records whether the number of fillable form elements matches the number of fields in the form's description. Instances where this is recorded as False, denote cases where autofill failed to preview/fill an autofill suggestion. This can happen when a fields is filtered out of a formless form.

histogram.name: Autofill.PasswordFormQueryVolume
histogram.summary: Tracks the increased load on the Autofill server if the restriction on querying for password forms with fewer than 3 fields were omitted.

histogram.name: Autofill.PayloadCompressionRatio
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 1/2016, autofill payload compression was removed.
histogram.summary: Compression ratio of the query and upload payload that are sent to the Autofill server. The payload is compressed using gzip.

histogram.name: Autofill.PaymentsCustomerDataBillingIdIsValid
histogram.summary: When PaymentsCustomerData is used to send a request to Google Payments, we log the validity state of the billing customer ID.

histogram.name: Autofill.PaymentsCustomerDataBillingIdStatus
histogram.summary: When PaymentsCustomerData is used to send a request to Google Payments, we log the validity state of the billing customer ID.

histogram.name: Autofill.ProfileActionOnFormSubmitted
histogram.summary: The profile action that took place when a form was submitted.

histogram.name: AutoFill.ProfileCount
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 3/2011, replaced by Autofill.StoredProfileCount.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of Autofill address profiles a user has.

histogram.name: Autofill.ProfileSuggestionsMadeWithFormatter
histogram.summary: This metric is recorded when the autofill-use-improved-label-disambiguation experiment is enabled and profile suggestions are available. This metric measures how often suggestions were created with and without a formatter.

histogram.name: AutoFill.Quality
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 3/2011, replaced by Autofill.Quality.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The quality of the AutoFill implementation.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 2/2014 (M35), replaced by Autofill.UserHappiness.
histogram.summary: The quality of the Autofill implementation.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.HeuristicType
histogram.summary: The quality of Autofill's heuristic field type detection.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.HeuristicType.ByFieldType
histogram.summary: The quality of Autofill's heuristic field type detection, broken down by the specific field type. Fields with multiple possible types (based on the stored Autofill data) are logged as having ambiguous type.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.PredictedType
histogram.summary: The overall quality of the Autofill field type predictions.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.PredictedType.ByFieldType
histogram.summary: The overall quality of the Autofill field type predictions, broken down by the specific field type. Fields with multiple possible types (based on the stored Autofill data) are logged as having ambiguous type.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.ServerType
histogram.summary: The quality of the Autofill server's field type detection.

histogram.name: Autofill.Quality.ServerType.ByFieldType
histogram.summary: The quality of the Autofill server's field type detection, broken down by the specific field type. Fields with multiple possible types (based on the stored Autofill data) are logged as having ambiguous type.

histogram.name: Autofill.QueriedCreditCardFormIsSecure
histogram.summary: For credit card forms that are queried for Autofill, a ratio of how many are within secure contexts (which includes mixed passive content).

histogram.name: Autofill.Query.BackoffDelay
histogram.summary: The delay of a network request for a query due to exponential backoff.

histogram.name: Autofill.Query.FailingPayloadSize
histogram.summary: The number of bytes that were sent in a query that subsequently failed. This is to help determine the appropriate threshold at which autofill queries should switch from GET to POST, and if there are certain sizes of queries which are prone to failure.

histogram.name: Autofill.Query.HttpResponseCode
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 8/2018, replaced by Autofill.Query.HttpResponseOrErrorCode.
