histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the JSONBookmarks test that runs on recovery startups. The JSONBookmarks test checks to make sure that the JSON encoded bookmarks file is properly formed.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.JSONLocalState
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the JSONLocalState test that runs on recovery startups. The JSONLocalState test checks to make sure that the JSON encoded Local State file is properly formed.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.JSONPreferences
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the JSONPreferences test that runs on recovery startups. The JSONPreferences test checks to make sure that the Preferences file is properly formed.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.OperatingSystem
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: TBD - Not run automatically yet, so this is just a placeholder for future metrics collection. Any samples collected here represent users running diagnostics manually.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.PathDictionaries
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the PathDictionaries test that runs on recovery startups. The PathDictionaries test checks makes sure that the path to the Dictionaries folder exists and has the right permissions.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.PathLocalState
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the PathLocalState test that runs on recovery startups. The PathLocalState test checks makes sure that the path to the Local State folder exists and has the right permissions.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.PathResources
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the PathResources test that runs on recovery startups. The PathResources test checks makes sure that the path to the Resources folder exists and has the right permissions.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.PathUserData
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of diagnostics for the PathUserData test that runs on recovery startups. The PathUserData test checks makes sure that the path to the User Data folder exists and has the right permissions.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityAppCache
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityAppCache test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the App Cache database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityArchivedHistory
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of Jun 2014: we no longer have an archived database.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityArchivedHistory test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Archived History database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityCookie
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityCookie test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Cookie database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityDatabaseTracker
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityDatabaseTracker test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Database Tracker database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityFavicons
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityFavicons test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Favicons database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityHistory
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityHistory test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the History database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityNSSCert
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityNSSCert test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the NSS Certificate database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityNSSKey
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityNSSKey test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the NSS Key database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityThumbnails
histogram.obsolete: Removed 05/2016 in Issue 617226; has not been valid for many years.
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityThumbnails test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Thumbnails database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityTopSites
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityTopSites test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the TopSites database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.SQLiteIntegrityWebData
histogram.summary: Shows the success and failure rates of the SQLiteIntegrityWebData test that runs on recovery startups. The test checks the integrity of the Web Data database.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.Test.Version
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: TBD - Not run automatically yet, so this is just a placeholder for future metrics collection. Any samples collected here represent users running diagnostics manually.

histogram.name: Diagnostics.TestFailures
histogram.summary: Histogram comparing the various types of diagnostic test failures when diagnostic tests are run. Note that some types of test failures cause the rest of the tests to be skipped.

histogram.name: Dialog.Create
histogram.summary: Counts the number times dialog boxes are created using a particular parent class.

histogram.name: Dialog.Creation
histogram.summary: Counts the number times various types of dialog boxes are created.

histogram.name: Dialog.Delegate.Creation
histogram.summary: Counts the number times dialog boxes are created using DialogDelegate.

histogram.name: Dialog.DialogDelegate.Duration
histogram.summary: How long dialog boxes are open, for dialog boxes created using the parent class DialogDelegate. This will include bubbles that use BubbleDialogDelegateView as a parent class, and dialogs that use DialogDelegateView as a parent class. This is logged on delegate destruction.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.BuildCache.File.Size
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Reports size of font cache file. This is reported every time we rebuild font cache.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.BuildCache.Ignored
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Reports the total number of fonts that will be ignored while building static font cache due to size limitation. During cache building phase if our logic suggests that we need to put more than 70% of font file contents into cache file then we don't cache that particular font file. These ignored font files are directly picked up from system fonts folder during Direct Write cache building process. Our end goal is to minimize costly open and close operations on font files in system folder.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Gfx.InitializeLoopCount
histogram.summary: The number of iterations that was required to initialize Direct Write. This metric is taken by the browser process at startup. The value -1 is reported when the initialization failed. The fallback path using GDI is used instead of DWrite.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Ignored
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Reports the total number of fonts that will be ignored while loading a custom font collection. With current criteria fonts that are not in system-font location will be ignored.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Loaded
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Reports the total number of fonts to be loaded through a custom font collection. This actually reports total font entries from registry excluding font entries that point to non-system location.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.LoadTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Measures the total time spent in loading a custom font collection in non-cache-file mode. We load system fonts as a custom font collection to avoid any interaction with windows font cache service from sandboxed renderer process. Please note that windows font cache services is different from our cache file approach (later referred here as cache-file mode).

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.LoadTime.Cached
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016, as the code path containing this metric was deprecated in favor of DWriteFontProxyImpl.
histogram.summary: Measures the total time spent in loading a custom font collection in cache-file mode. We load system fonts as a custom font collection to avoid any interaction with windows font cache service from sandboxed renderer process. Please note that windows font cache services is different from our cache file approach (later referred here as cache-file mode)

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.CreateFontFaceResult
histogram.summary: Records the error returned from CreateFontFace.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.EmptyFamilyResultsRatio
histogram.summary: When scanning fonts for meta data as part of local matching, record the ratio of empty per-family results to all per-family results as percentage. Recorded in DWriteFontTableBuilder at the time of finishing scanning the font files for their name meta information. A value of 100% means, all per-family scan tasks came back empty. A value of 0% means, all per-family tasks yielded at least one font file. Used for diagnosing https://crbug.com/1009402.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.Fallback.CacheSize
histogram.summary: Records how many font families are in the fallback cache.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.FallbackResult
histogram.summary: Measures the effectiveness of the font fallback proxy. This tracks if we were able to find a suitable font to render the character, and whether an IPC was necessary.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.FamilyCount
histogram.summary: The number of font families as seen by the font proxy in the renderer.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.FamilyCountIndexingStart
histogram.summary: Number of font families on the system as retrieved from DWrite API (usually less than to number of font files reported in DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.NumFontFiles as a family can contain multiple font files). Recorded in DWriteFontTableBuilder at the time of starting scanning the font files for their name meta information. Used for diagnosing https://crbug.com/1009402.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.FontProxyError
histogram.summary: The errors encountered by the DirectWrite font proxy while loading fonts.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.GetSystemFontCollectionResult
histogram.summary: Records the error returned from GetSystemFontCollection.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.IndexingSpeed
histogram.summary: Indexing speed in font files per second while building the local font unique name lookup table. Recorded after building the lookup table in DWriteFontLookupTableBuilder.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LastResortFontCount
histogram.summary: The number of last resort fallback fonts found on the system as seen by the browser.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LastResortFontFileCount
histogram.summary: The number of font files found for a last resort fallback font.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LoaderType
histogram.summary: The codepath that was used to load a font family. This is logged in the browser every time a renderer attempts to load a font family, once per font file.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LoadFamilyResult
histogram.summary: The outcome of attempting to load a font family in the renderer (success vs failure and number of families). This is logged in the renderer once per family that is loaded.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LoadFamilyTime
histogram.summary: The time taken to load a font family, excluding glyph data. This is logged in the renderer once per family that is loaded.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTableBuildTime
histogram.summary: Time it takes to build the font unique name lookup table. Recorded at the initial build of this table, after which it is kept for the lifetime of the browser process. The start time is recorded when the actual task of starting to scan fonts has started.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTableDiskCacheHit
histogram.summary: Measures whether the font table lookup structure was loaded from disk cache or had to be rebuilt due to changes in installed fonts, DWrite version or Chrome version. Recorded when DWriteFontLookupTableBuilder starts to prepare the lookup table.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTablePersistSuccess
histogram.summary: Measures whether the font table lookup structure was successfully persisted to disk after having been constructed. Recorded when DWriteFontLookupTableBuilder finalizes the lookup table.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTableReadyTime
histogram.summary: Time it takes from scheduling the preparation of the font lookup table until it is ready, independent of whether it is read from cache or built by scanning fonts. Start time is recorded when the call is made to prepare the table. Duration and this histogram's value is recorded either when it is done reading from cache or when the table construction is ready. This metric includes a scheduling delay from when the task to read from cache or build is scheduled, untils its execution, while DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTableBuildTime does not include this scheduling delay and measures only from when the first font scanning task is started.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.LookupTableSize
histogram.summary: Size of the font unique name lookup table in kilobytes. Recorded at the initial build of this table, after which it is kept for the lifetime of the browser process.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.MessageFilterError
histogram.summary: Errors, if any, encountered by the DirectWrite font proxy message filter.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.MostFrequentScanningFailure
histogram.summary: When scanning fonts for meta data as part of local matching, record the most frequent failure of why no meta data was gathered for a font family. Recorded in DWriteFontTableBuilder at the time of finishing scanning the font files for their name meta information. Values are Windows HRESULT error codes, including custom values for implementation specific failure cases. Used for diagnosing https://crbug.com/1009402.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.NumFontFiles
histogram.summary: Number of font files which were encountered during scanning for locally installed font and building the unique font name lookup table. Recorded in DWriteFontTableBuilder while after the building the lookup table. Kept for the lifetime of the browser process after that.

histogram.name: DirectWrite.Fonts.Proxy.TableBuildTimedOut
histogram.summary: Shows whether the font lookup table construction timed out. Recorded when DWriteFontLookupTableBuilder finalizes the lookup table.

histogram.name: DisabledExtension.ExtensionWipedStatus
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Whether an extension has been wiped out.

histogram.name: DisabledExtension.SideloadWipeoutCount
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: How many external extensions get wiped out as a result of the Sideload Wipeout one-time initiative.

histogram.name: DisabledExtension.SideloadWipeoutNeeded
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Whether any extension got wiped out as a result of the Sideload Wipeout one-time initiative.

histogram.name: DisabledExtension.UserSelection
histogram.obsolete: Removed 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The user selection in the Sideload Wipeout bubble, grouped by the UmaWipeoutHistogramOptions enum.

histogram.name: Discarding.DiscardCandidatesCount
histogram.summary: The number of tabs discard candidates. This is recorded each time Chrome needs to urgently discard a tab.

histogram.name: Discarding.DiscardsPer10Minutes
histogram.summary: Number of tabs discarded in each interval of 10 minutes, per discard reason.

histogram.name: Discarding.LargestTabFootprint
histogram.summary: The largest tab's resident set among all the urgent discarding candidates.

histogram.name: Discarding.OldestTabFootprint
histogram.summary: The resident set of the oldest urgent discarding candidate.

histogram.name: Discarding.OnCriticalPressure.TotalRSS_Mb
histogram.summary: An estimate of the total resident set of Chrome when receiving a critical memory pressure event, in megabytes. Note that the estimate is based on the most recent data collected by Performance Manager, which are refreshed at a low frequency (up to 2 minutes).

histogram.name: Discarding.OnCriticalPressure.TotalRSS_PercentOfRAM
histogram.summary: An estimate of the total resident set of Chrome when receiving a critical memory pressure event, in percentage of the total amount of RAM. Note that the estimate is based on the most recent data collected by Performance Manager, which are refreshed at a low frequency (up to 2 minutes).

histogram.name: Discarding.OnlineOnReload
histogram.summary: Whether the machine was online when a discarded tab was reloaded.

histogram.name: Discarding.ReloadsPer10Minutes
histogram.summary: Number of discarded tabs reloaded in each interval of 10 minutes, grouped by their discard reason.

histogram.name: Discarding.Urgent.NumAliveTabs
histogram.obsolete: Removed 08/2019. Use Discarding.ReloadsPer10Minutes to assess whether tabs are discarded too often.
histogram.summary: Number of tabs that are not pending load or discarded when an urgent discard request is received.

histogram.name: Discarding.Urgent.TimeSinceLastUrgent
histogram.obsolete: Removed 08/2019. Use Discarding.ReloadsPer10Minutes to assess whether tabs are discarded too often.
histogram.summary: Time between two consecutive urgent discard requests. Urgent discards are undesirable; it is better to reduce memory usage before the system is in a bad state.

histogram.name: Discarding.Urgent.TimeSinceStartup
histogram.obsolete: Removed 08/2019. Use Discarding.ReloadsPer10Minutes to assess whether tabs are discarded too often.
histogram.summary: Time between Chrome startup and the first urgent discard request. Urgent discards are undesirable; it is better to reduce memory usage before the system is in a bad state.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.CertIo
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Records information about DiskBasedCertCache operations with respect to certificate chain positions. Zero indicates that a certificate is root, one indicates that it is the first intermediate certificate, etc.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.CertIoCacheResult
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Records the outcome of requests to retrieve certificates from the disk cache.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.CertIoReadSuccessLeaf
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Whether or not the leaf certificate of a certificate chain was successfuly read from the disk cache.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.CertIoWriteSuccessLeaf
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Whether or not the leaf certificate of a certificate chain was successfully written to the disk cache.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.ChainReadTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Measures the wall clock time spent reading a certificate chain. The starting time is when the read command is issued, and the ending time is when all of the certificates in the chain have been read into memory.

histogram.name: DiskBasedCertCache.ChainWriteTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 01/2016. CertCacheTrial has been removed. https://crbug.com/522312
histogram.summary: Measures the wall clock time spent writing a certificate chain to disk. The starting time is when the write command is issued, and the ending time is when all the certificates in the chain have been written to disk.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.AsyncIOTime
histogram.summary: The time for an async IO operation to complete. This covers content Writes and Reads, measured from the cache thread.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.AsyncReadDispatchTime
histogram.summary: The synchronous portion of an async read.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.AsyncWriteDispatchTime
histogram.summary: The synchronous portion of an async write.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.AverageOpenEntries2
histogram.summary: The average number of open disk cache entries at any given time.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.BufferBytes
histogram.summary: The total size of all the internal buffers.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.ByteIORate
histogram.summary: The number of KB accessed from the cache in a 30 seconds interval.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.CreateTime
histogram.summary: The time spent creating a new entry on the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.DeletedAge
histogram.summary: The age of the last entry on the queue of deleted entries.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.DeleteData
histogram.summary: The size of the data portion of a given entry by the time it is deleted.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.DeletedRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the deleted entries.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.DeleteFailed
histogram.summary: Number of external files that we were unable to delete.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.DeleteHeader
histogram.summary: The size of the HTML headers of a given entry by the time it is deleted.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.Entries
histogram.summary: The number of entries currently stored on the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.EntriesFull
histogram.summary: The number of entries currently stored on the cache, after it is full.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.EntryAccessRate
histogram.summary: The number of entries accessed by the cache in a 30 seconds interval.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.EntrySize
histogram.summary: The average size of an entry. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.Error
histogram.summary: Critical error ids.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FilesAge
histogram.summary: The age of the cache's files (wall time).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FillupAge
histogram.summary: The age of the cache (in hours) by the time we reach the size limit.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FillupTime
histogram.summary: The number of hours required to fill up the cache, as measured by the cache being running.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstByteIORate
histogram.summary: The average number of KB accessed from the cache in a 30 seconds interval, by the time we reach the cache size limit.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstEntryAccessRate
histogram.summary: The average number of entries accessed by the cache in a 30 seconds interval, by the time we reach the cache size limit.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstEntrySize
histogram.summary: The average size of an entry by the time we reach the cache size limit.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstHighUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that are highly reused, by the time we fill up the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstHitRatio
histogram.summary: The hit ratio by the time we fill up the cache. Of course, we started with an empty cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstLargeEntriesRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB, by the time we reach the cache size limit.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstLowUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that have been reused a few times, by the time we fill up the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstNoUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that have never been reused, by the time we fill up the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.FirstResurrectRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of re-created deleted entries versus entries that we really don't know about.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.GetRankings
histogram.summary: The time spent reading the LRU-related portion of an entry.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HighUseAge
histogram.summary: The age of the last entry on the queue of highly used entries.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HighUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that are highly reused.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HitRatio
histogram.summary: The current hit ratio. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place, and data from the fill-up period is not considered.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HitRatioBySize2
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each size. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain size, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.0.Size2.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HitRatioByTotalTime
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each total time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.0.TotalTime.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.HitRatioByUseTime
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each use time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.0.UseTime.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.IndexLoad
histogram.summary: Percentage of the index table that is currently used (the cache is full).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.KeySize
histogram.summary: The size of each key.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.LargeEntriesRatio
histogram.summary: Percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.LoadTime
histogram.summary: The time to load the main entry data from disk, with a "loaded" system.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.LowUseAge
histogram.summary: The age of the last entry on the queue of entries reused a few times.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.LowUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that have been reused a few times.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.MaxOpenEntries2
histogram.summary: The maximum number of simultaneously open disk cache entries.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.MaxSize
histogram.summary: The maximum size of the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.MaxSize2
histogram.summary: The maximum size of the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.NoUseAge
histogram.summary: The age of the next entry to be evicted that has never been reused.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.NoUseRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the entries that have never been reused.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.NumberOfReferences
histogram.summary: The number of open entry references at any given moment.
histogram.details: Closely related to AverageOpenEntries, but this one is not the average per client but instead a direct histogram updated every 30 secs.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.OpenTime
histogram.summary: The time spent opening an entry already on the cache (cache hit).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.PendingIO
histogram.summary: The number of pending IO operations (Async IO).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.ReadTime
histogram.summary: The time spent reading from an entry.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.ResurrectRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of re-created deleted entries versus entries that we really don't know about.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.ShortReport
histogram.summary: The reason for not sending a full report.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.Size
histogram.summary: The current size of the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.Size2
histogram.summary: The current size of the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.SparseReadTime
histogram.summary: The time spent reading from an sparse entry.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.SparseWriteTime
histogram.summary: The time spent writing to an sparse entry.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalClearTimeV1
histogram.summary: The time spent deleting the cache. (Clear browsing data).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalClearTimeV2
histogram.summary: The time spent deleting the cache. (Clear browsing data).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalDoomCache
histogram.summary: The number of times that this cache has been deleted by the user.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalDoomRecentEntries
histogram.summary: The number of times that the user has deleted new entries from this cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalEvictionsGaJs
histogram.summary: The number of times that ga.js was evicted.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalFatalErrors
histogram.summary: The number of fatal errors detected for this cache (so we delete everything).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalIOTime
histogram.summary: The total time it takes to perform a payload IO operation (AKA, directed to an entry). This is measured from the IO thread.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTime
histogram.summary: Number of hours that the cache has been used.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTimeNotFull
histogram.summary: The number of hours that the cache has been in use, for users that still have available space.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTrimDeletedTime
histogram.summary: The time spent removing deleted entries from the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTrimTime
histogram.summary: The time spent removing old entries from the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTrimTimeV1
histogram.summary: The time spent removing old entries from the cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TotalTrimTimeV2
histogram.summary: The time spent evicting entries from the cache (moving them to the deleted list).

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TrimAge
histogram.summary: The time that an entry lives in the cache without being accessed until it is finally purged.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TrimDeletedItems
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are deleted on a single iteration.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TrimItemsV1
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted on a single iteration.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TrimItemsV2
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted (moved to the deleted list) on a single iteration.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.TrimRate
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted per hour of use.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.UpdateRank
histogram.summary: The time spent moving an entry to the front of the LRU list.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.UsedSpace
histogram.summary: The percentage of the allowed disk space that we are currently using.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.UseTime
histogram.summary: Number of hours that the cache has been used since last week.

histogram.name: DiskCache.0.WriteTime
histogram.summary: The time spent writing to an entry.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.AsyncIOTime
histogram.summary: The time for an async IO operation to complete. This covers content Writes and Reads, measured from the cache thread. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.AsyncReadDispatchTime
histogram.summary: The synchronous portion of an async read. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.AsyncWriteDispatchTime
histogram.summary: The synchronous portion of an async write. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.AverageOpenEntries2
histogram.summary: The average number of open disk cache entries at any given time. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.BufferBytes
histogram.summary: The total size of all the internal buffers. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.ByteIORate
histogram.summary: The number of KB accessed from the cache in a 30 seconds interval. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.CreateTime
histogram.summary: The time spent creating a new entry on the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.DeleteData
histogram.summary: The size of the data portion of a given entry by the time it is deleted. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.DeleteFailed
histogram.summary: Number of external files that we were unable to delete. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.DeleteHeader
histogram.summary: The size of the HTML headers of a given entry by the time it is deleted. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.Entries
histogram.summary: The number of entries currently stored on the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.EntriesFull
histogram.summary: The number of entries currently stored on the cache, after it is full. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.EntryAccessRate
histogram.summary: The number of entries accessed by the cache in a 30 seconds interval. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.EntrySize
histogram.summary: The average size of an entry. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.Error
histogram.summary: Critical error ids. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FilesAge
histogram.summary: The age of the cache's files (wall time). Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FillupAge
histogram.summary: The age of the cache (in hours) by the time we reach the size limit. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FillupTime
histogram.summary: The number of hours required to fill up the cache, as measured by the cache being running. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FirstByteIORate
histogram.summary: The average number of KB accessed from the cache in a 30 seconds interval, by the time we reach the cache size limit. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FirstEntryAccessRate
histogram.summary: The average number of entries accessed by the cache in a 30 seconds interval, by the time we reach the cache size limit. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FirstEntrySize
histogram.summary: The average size of an entry by the time we reach the cache size limit. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FirstHitRatio
histogram.summary: The hit ratio by the time we fill up the cache. Of course, we started with an empty cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.FirstLargeEntriesRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB, by the time we reach the cache size limit. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.GetRankings
histogram.summary: The time spent reading the LRU-related portion of an entry. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.HitRatio
histogram.summary: The current hit ratio. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place, and data from the fill-up period is not considered. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.HitRatioBySize2
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each size. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain size, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.2.Size2. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.HitRatioByTotalTime
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each total time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.2.TotalTime. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.HitRatioByUseTime
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each use time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.2.UseTime. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.IndexLoad
histogram.summary: Percentage of the index table that is currently used (the cache is full). Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.KeySize
histogram.summary: The size of each key. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.LargeEntriesRatio
histogram.summary: Percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.LoadTime
histogram.summary: The time to load the main entry data from disk, with a "loaded" system. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.MaxOpenEntries2
histogram.summary: The maximum number of simultaneously open disk cache entries. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.MaxSize
histogram.summary: The maximum size of the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.MaxSize2
histogram.summary: The maximum size of the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.NumberOfReferences
histogram.summary: The number of open entry references at any given moment. Closely related to AverageOpenEntries, but this one is not the average per client but instead a direct histogram updated every 30 secs. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.OpenTime
histogram.summary: The time spent opening an entry already on the cache (cache hit). Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.PendingIO
histogram.summary: The number of pending IO operations (Async IO). Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.ReadTime
histogram.summary: The time spent reading from an entry. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.ResurrectRatio
histogram.summary: The percentage of re-created deleted entries versus entries that we really don't know about. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.ShortReport
histogram.summary: The reason for not sending a full report. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.Size
histogram.summary: The current size of the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.Size2
histogram.summary: The current size of the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: The time spent deleting the cache. (Clear browsing data). Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.TotalTime
histogram.summary: Number of hours that the cache has been used. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.TotalTrimDeletedTime
histogram.summary: The time spent removing deleted entries from the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: The time spent removing old entries from the cache. Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: The time spent evicting entries from the cache (moving them to the deleted list). Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: The number of entries that are deleted on a single iteration. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.TrimItemsV1
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted on a single iteration. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.TrimItemsV2
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted (moved to the deleted list) on a single iteration. Media-specific cache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.2.TrimRate
histogram.summary: The number of entries that are evicted per hour of use. Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: The time spent moving an entry to the front of the LRU list. Media-specific cache.

histogram.summary: Number of hours that the cache has been used since last week. Media-specific cache.

histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The hit ratio by the time we fill up the cache. Of course, we started with an empty cache. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.FirstLargeEntriesRatio
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB, by the time we reach the cache size limit. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.GetRankings
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time spent reading the LRU-related portion of an entry. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.HitRatio
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The current hit ratio. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place, and data from the fill-up period is not considered. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.HitRatioBySize2
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each size. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain size, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.4.Size2. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.HitRatioByTotalTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each total time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.4.TotalTime. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.HitRatioByUseTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The hit ratio for each use time. To calculate the hit ratio of caches of a certain age, take the ratio of a bin in this histogram to the same bin in DiskCache.4.UseTime. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.IndexLoad
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Percentage of the index table that is currently used (the cache is full). ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.KeySize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The size of each key. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.LargeEntriesRatio
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Percentage of the cache used by entries of more than 512 KB. It is only measured after the cache is full, so evictions are taking place. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.LoadTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time to load the main entry data from disk, with a "loaded" system. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.MaxOpenEntries2
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The maximum number of simultaneously open disk cache entries. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.MaxSize2
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The maximum size of the cache. ShaderCache.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.OpenTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.PendingIO

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.TotalTime

histogram.name: DiskCache.4.TotalTrimTimeV1

histogram.name: Display.ParseEdidFailure
histogram.summary: Type of failure that occurs during EDID parsing. Typically the failure is caused by a mismatch between the EDID size and the expected offset of the data component.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.InternalDisplayZoomPercentage
histogram.summary: The zoom percentage that the user has set on the internal display and is actively using. This is emitted when the zoom factor has been updated in display manager and has not been changed for a while.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.MirroringDisplayCountRanges
histogram.summary: The number of displays connected to the device that are in software or hardware mirror mode. This is emitted once when the normal or mixed mirror mode is enabled through API call, or the display configuration changes (e.g. adding or removing a display) when mirror mode is on.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.MirrorModeTypes
histogram.summary: The types of mirror mode in which the displays connected to the device are in. This is emitted once when the normal or mixed mirror mode is enabled through API call, or the display configuration changes ( e.g. adding or removing a display) when mirror mode is on.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.MultiDisplayMode
histogram.summary: The mode in which the connected displays to the device are in. This is emitted once when displays are added or removed, or when the user changes the mode by e.g. enabling mirror or unified modes.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.UnifiedDesktopDisplayCountRange
histogram.summary: The number of displays connected to the device when Unified Desktop mode is on. This is emitted when Unified Desktop mode is turned on, or the displays are added or removed while in Unified Mode.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.UpdateDisplayConfigurationTask.ExecutionTime
histogram.summary: Records the execution time to update the display configuration. Emitted when the update-display-configuration task finishes, successfully or not.

histogram.name: DisplayManager.UpdateDisplayConfigurationTask.Success
histogram.summary: Records whether or not the display configuration was successfully updated. Emitted when the update-display-configuration task finishes, successfully or not.

histogram.name: DisplayScheduler.ShouldNotDraw
histogram.obsolete: Removed after M72 since no longer needed.
histogram.summary: The reason for the DisplayScheduler to abort a draw operation.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptCancelled
histogram.summary: The attempt which completed after the job was already cancelled.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptDiscarded
histogram.summary: The attempt which completed after the job was already cancelled OR the attempt that has finished after host resolution was already completed by an earlier attempt.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptFailDuration
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in OS resolutions for actual navigations. These attempts which completed after the job was already canceled OR after the job was already completed by an earlier attempt. Note that cached resolutions may provide low (0ms?) resolution times.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptFailure
histogram.summary: The attempt that has not resolved the host successfully.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptFirstFailure
histogram.summary: The attempt that resolved the host first and the resolution was not successful.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptFirstSuccess
histogram.summary: The attempt that resolved the host first and the resolution was successful.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptSuccess
histogram.summary: The attempt that has resolved the host successfully.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptSuccessDuration
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in OS resolutions that succeeded and were requested for actual navigations. These attempts which completed after the job was already canceled OR after the job was already completed by an earlier attempt. Note that cached resolutions may provide low (0ms?) resolution times.

histogram.name: DNS.AttemptTimeSavedByRetry
histogram.summary: This histogram shows the time saved by having spawned an extra attempt, when the first attempt didn't finish before retry attempt.

histogram.name: DNS.CacheEvicted
histogram.summary: The time left to expiration of an entry when it is removed while compacting the HostCache.

histogram.name: DNS.CacheExpired
histogram.summary: The time since expiration of an entry when it is removed while compacting the HostCache.

histogram.name: DNS.CacheExpiredOnGet
histogram.summary: The time since expiration of an entry when it is removed on lookup.

histogram.name: DNS.EmptyAddressListAndNoError
histogram.summary: Error status when an empty address list was found in OnLookupComplete().

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.Erase
histogram.summary: The reason for erasing a DNS entry from the host cache.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.EraseStale.ExpiredBy
histogram.summary: When erasing a stale (expired or old-network) DNS entry from the host cache, how long past the expiration time it is.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.EraseStale.NetworkChanges
histogram.summary: When erasing a stale (expired or old-network) DNS entry from the host cache how many network changes happened between setting and erasing it.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.EraseStale.StaleHits
histogram.summary: When erasing a stale (expired or old-network) DNS entry from the host cache how many hits it received while stale.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.EraseValid.ValidFor
histogram.summary: When erasing a valid DNS entry from the host cache, for how much longer it would have remained valid.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.Lookup
histogram.summary: The outcome of looking up a DNS entry in the host cache.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.LookupStale.ExpiredBy
histogram.summary: When looking up a stale DNS entry in the host cache, how long past the expiration time it is.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.LookupStale.NetworkChanges
histogram.summary: When looking up a stale DNS entry in the host cache, how many network changes happened between setting it and looking it up.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.RestoreSize
histogram.summary: Number of HostCache entries persisted to disk, measured at restore time.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.RestoreSuccess
histogram.summary: Whether the persisted HostCache entries were restored successfully.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.Set
histogram.summary: The outcome of setting a DNS entry in the host cache.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.UpdateStale.AddressListDelta
histogram.summary: When updating a stale (expired or old-network) DNS entry in the host cache, and both results are successful, how the address list differs between the old and new entries.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.UpdateStale.ExpiredBy
histogram.summary: When updating a stale (expired or old-network) DNS entry in the host cache, how long past the expiration time the old entry was.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.UpdateStale.NetworkChanges
histogram.summary: When updating a stale (expired or old-nework) DNS entry in the host cache, how many network changes happened between setting the old entry and setting the new entry.

histogram.name: DNS.HostCache.UpdateStale.StaleHits
histogram.summary: The number of hits received to an updated stale DNS entry in the host cache while it was stale.

histogram.name: DNS.IndependentFailedNavigation
histogram.summary: When either a pre-resolution was not done recently enough to provide benefit, or the corresponding pre-resolution is still pending, this histogram shows the duration of time used to resolve a hostname as not existing during a failed attempt to navigate to (GET) a URL. In newer versions, if the hostname has never been found as a link during a page scan, and it has a referring URL, then it is added to referrer list data structure (hoping we'll do better next time).

histogram.name: DNS.IndependentNavigation
histogram.summary: When either a pre-resolution was not done recently enough to provide benefit, or the corresponding pre-resolution is still pending, this histogram shows the duration of the duration of time used to resolve a hostname to navigate to (GET) a URL. In newer versions, if the hostname has never been found as a link during a page scan, and it has a referring URL, then it is added to referrer list data structure (hoping we'll do better next time).

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool).

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime_HIGHEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority HIGHEST when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime_IDLE
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority IDLE when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime_LOW
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOW when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime_LOWEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOWEST when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTime_MEDIUM
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTime.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the time the HostResolverImpl::Job was created and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority MEDIUM when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool).

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_HIGHEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority HIGHEST when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_IDLE
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority IDLE when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_LOW
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOW when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_LOWEST
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority LOWEST when started.

histogram.name: DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange_MEDIUM
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.JobQueueTimeAfterChange.
histogram.summary: Time elapsed between the last time the priority of a HostResolverImpl::Job changed (when a Request was attached or detached) and the time the Job was started (a getaddrinfo call was dispatched to the thread pool). Includes only Jobs which had priority MEDIUM when started.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchCacheEviction
histogram.summary: The duration of time used (most recently) to pre-resolve a hostname, when the prefetched resolution was apparently evicted from the cache. The included samples only list pre-resolution times when the later navigations/fetches took in excess of 15ms.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchCacheEvictionL
histogram.summary: The duration of time used (most recently) to pre-resolve a hostname, when the prefetched resolution was apparently evicted from the cache. The included samples only list pre-resolution times when the later navigations/fetches took in excess of 15ms.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchFoundName
histogram.summary: Replaced by DNS.PrefetchFoundNameL.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchFoundNameL
histogram.summary: The duration of time used by the DNS pre-resolving threads to resolve a host name via the network. Any resolutions that are faster than 15ms are considered to be local cache hits, not requiring network access, and are not included in this histogram. This histogram is most useful for estimating the typical cost of a name resolution, but it also estimates the total number of network-based resolutions induced by this feature. Not all these resolutions prove helpful (i.e., the user does not always actually visit the resolved hostnames).

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchNegativeHit
histogram.summary: Replaced by DNS.PrefetchNegativeHitL.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchNegativeHitL
histogram.summary: The duration of time saved due to DNS pre-resolving in the "name not found" case. Time "savings" shown in the histogram are defined to be the difference between the DNS pre-resolution duration, and the DNS resolution duration seen during a navigation. These cache hits only list events where the DNS pre-resolve duration for a host was in excess of 15ms (i.e., the network was consulted), and the actual DNS resolution (when a user attempted to navigate to a link with the same host name) took less than 15ms (i.e., the network was not consulted), which means the gain was a result of a "cache hit" in the OS cache. For some users with LANs, all negative results (even when the DNS cache might otherwise help) take about 2.5 seconds (due to timeouts for netbios broadcasts), and hence no savings are possible (or shown) for such users in this category.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchPositiveHit
histogram.summary: Replaced by DNS.PrefetchPositiveHitL.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchPositiveHitL
histogram.summary: The duration of time saved due to DNS pre-resolving in the "name was found" case, and induced by either a page scan for a link or an omnibox entry by the user. Time "savings" shown in the histogram are defined to be the difference between the DNS pre-resolution duration, and the DNS resolution duration seen during a navigation. These cache hits only list events where the DNS pre-resolve duration for a host was in excess of 15ms (i.e., the network was consulted), and the actual DNS resolution (when a user attempted to navigate to a link with the same host name) took less than 15ms (i.e., the network was not consulted), which means the gain was a result of a "cache hit" in the OS cache.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchQueue
histogram.summary: The duration of time spent by a proposed resolution waiting in the queue to be resolved. This number is in addition to any DNS resolution time that may come later.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchReferredPositiveHit
histogram.summary: The duration of time saved due to DNS pre-resolving in the "name was found" case, and induced by predicting (using referrer lists) that a resolution was needed. Time "savings" shown in the histogram are defined to be the difference between the DNS pre-resolution duration, and the DNS resolution duration seen during a navigation. These cache hits only list events where the DNS pre-resolve duration for a host was in excess of 15ms (i.e., the network was consulted), and the actual DNS resolution (when a user attempted to navigate to a link with the same host name) took less than 15ms (i.e., the network was not consulted), which means the gain was a result of a "cache hit" in the OS cache.

histogram.name: DNS.PrefetchResolution
histogram.summary: The duration of time used by the DNS pre-resolving threads to resolve a host name via the network. Any resolutions that are faster than 15ms are considered to be local cache hits, not requiring network access, and are not included in this histogram. This histogram is most useful for estimating the typical cost of a name resolution, but it also estimates the total number of network-based resolutions induced by this feature. Not all these resolutions prove helpful (i.e., the user does not always actually visit the resolved hostnames).

histogram.name: DNS.QueueRecycledDeltaOver2
histogram.summary: When, due to congestion avoidance, a queued pre-resolution is abandoned (recycled) without actually being resolved, this histograms records the age in the queue of that entry. Only times over 2 seconds are recorded in this histogram.

histogram.name: DNS.QueueRecycledUnder2
histogram.summary: When, due to congestion avoidance, a queued pre-resolution is abandoned (recycled) without actually being resolved, this histograms records the age in the queue of that entry. Only times less than or equal to 2 seconds are recorded in this histogram.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveCategory
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ResolveCategory.
histogram.summary: Counts of successes and failures of OS resolutions in various categories.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveFail
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in OS resolutions for actual navigations. Note that cached OS resolutions may provide low (0ms?) resolution times.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveFail_FAMILY_IPV4
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveFail, but limited to pure IPv4 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveFail_FAMILY_IPV6
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveFail, but limited to pure IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveFail_FAMILY_UNSPEC
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveFail, but limited to IPv4/IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSpeculativeFail
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskFail.
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in speculative OS resolutions. Note that cached OS resolutions may provide low (0ms?) resolution times.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSpeculativeSuccess
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Duration of time taken in speculative OS resolution that succeeded. Note that cached resolutions may provide low (0ms?) resolution times.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSuccess
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskSuccess.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_IPV4
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to pure IPv4 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_IPV6
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to pure IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveSuccess_FAMILY_UNSPEC
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.ProcTaskSuccess.
histogram.summary: Same as DNS.ResolveSuccess, but limited to IPv4/IPv6 lookups.

histogram.name: DNS.ResolveUnspecWaste
histogram.summary: Counts of hits and misses in the DNS cache and DNS jobs pool of wasted HostResolverImpl::Jobs that could be avoided by always resolving using AF_UNSPEC.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.NetworkEarly
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver returns, a stale cached result was available, and the network responded before or exactly at the stale delay, how much earlier it responded.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.NetworkLate
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver returns, a stale cached result was available, and the network responded after the stale delay, how much later it responded.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.RequestOutcome
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver returns or is canceled, the outcome of the request.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.RestoreSizeOnCacheMiss
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver has no stale cached result available, the number of host cache entries that were restored from prefs.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.SizeOnCacheMiss
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver has no stale cached result available, the number of entries in the host cache.

histogram.name: DNS.StaleHostResolver.StaleAddressListDelta
histogram.summary: When a DNS request made through StaleHostResolver had a stale cached result and both the stale and network results were successful, the difference between the old and new address lists.

histogram.name: DNS.TotalTime
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.TotalTime.
histogram.summary: Duration of time since a HostResolverImpl::Resolve request to the time a result is posted. Excludes canceled, evicted, and aborted requests. Includes cache hits (recorded as 0). Excludes speculative requests.

histogram.name: DNS.TotalTime_speculative
histogram.obsolete: Removed as of 9/2017. Replaced by Net.DNS.TotalTime_speculative.
histogram.summary: Duration of time since a HostResolverImpl::Resolve request to the time a result is posted. Excludes canceled, evicted, and aborted requests. Includes cache hits (recorded as 0). Speculative requests only.

histogram.name: DNS.UnexpectedResolution
histogram.summary: In some cases, such as when content arrives with embedded references to other servers, the prefetch system can't (or doesn't) attempt to pre-resolve the hostnames. As an example, a visit to www.cnn.com will fetch content with references to about 12 additional hostnames, none of which are currently anticipated. Such resolutions are termed "Unexpected Resolutions," and the durations associated with those DNS resolutions are shown below. Future features may attempt to learn (from prior experience locally, or from server provided hints), what secondary hostname resolutions should be done when a primary resolution (or navigation) takes place. This histogram shows what the potential savings are that "remain on the table" until we employ some of these more advanced features.

histogram.name: DNS.UnexpectedResolutionL
histogram.summary: In some cases, such as when content arrives with embedded references to other servers, or when a page (such as one in SSL) preclude scanning and prefetching, the prefetch system can't (or doesn't) attempt to pre-resolve the hostnames. As an example, a visit to www.cnn.com will fetch content with references to about 12 additional hostnames, none of which might be anticipated. Similarly, clicking on a link in an SSL page won't be anticipated (since scanning in not allowed by default). Such resolutions are termed "Unexpected Resolutions," and the durations associated with those navigation induced DNS resolutions are shown below. If a referring URL is available for the navigation, the relationship to the referring URL was recorded, and future navigations to the referring hostname would have induced a pre-resolution of hostname that caused an entry below. Such any entry may facilitate future listing in the ReferredPositiveHit histogram.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.ErrorPageUpdateStatus
histogram.summary: Status of DNS diagnostic probe updates sent to a Chrome net error page.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Time between starting and finishing DNS probe.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.NcnOffline.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Time between starting and finishing DNS probe when NCN says we're offline.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.NcnOffline.Result
histogram.summary: Result of DNS probes sent by the probe service when NCN says we're offline.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.NcnOnline.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Time between starting and finishing DNS probe when NCN says we're online.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.NcnOnline.Result
histogram.summary: Result of DNS probes sent by the probe service when NCN says we're online.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.Result
histogram.obsolete: Renamed 7/2013 to DnsProbe.ProbeResult. (Also switched to the full DnsProbe.ProbeStatus enum.)
histogram.summary: Result of DNS probes sent by the probe service.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultBadConfig.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Elapsed time of DNS probes that return PROBE_BAD_CONFIG.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultBadConfig.SystemIsLocalhost
histogram.summary: Whether the only nameserver in the system DNS config was 127.0.0.1 when the probe result was BAD_CONFIG.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultBadConfig.SystemJobResult
histogram.summary: The result of the system probe job when the overall probe result was BAD_CONFIG.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultBadConfig.SystemNameserverCount
histogram.summary: The number of nameservers in the system DNS config when the probe result was BAD_CONFIG.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultNoInternet.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Elapsed time of DNS probes that return PROBE_NO_INTERNET.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultNxdomain.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Elapsed time of DNS probes that return PROBE_NXDOMAIN.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.Probe.ResultUnknown.Elapsed
histogram.summary: Elapsed time of DNS probes that return PROBE_UNKNOWN.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.ProbeDuration
histogram.obsolete: Replaced 2/2019 with DnsProbe.ProbeDuration2, which uses TimeTicks instead of Time.
histogram.summary: Wall time between starting and finishing DNS probe.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.ProbeDuration2
histogram.summary: Time ticks between starting and finishing a DNS diagnostics probe.

histogram.name: DnsProbe.ProbeResult
histogram.summary: Result of DNS diagnostics probes sent by the probe service.

histogram.name: Document.BeforeUnloadDialog
histogram.summary: Records result of invoking beforeunload handler, that determines whether to show the dialog.

histogram.name: Document.OutliveTimeAfterShutdown.DestroyedBeforeProcessDies
histogram.summary: Records the GC count between the time when the document is shut down and and the time when the document is actually destroyed. This only counts documents that are destroyed before the process dies.

histogram.name: Document.OutliveTimeAfterShutdown.GCCount
histogram.summary: Records documents that survives some GCs after the document is shut down.

histogram.name: DocumentActivity.Enabled
histogram.summary: Recorded only for Android. Records on every metrics upload whether document mode is enabled.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.BeforeUnloadDialogDuration.ByNavigation
histogram.summary: Milliseconds spent in beforeunload dialog. Does not include time to process beforeunload event in JavaScript (see DocumentEventTiming.BeforeUnloadDuration). Recorded immediately after closing dialog, upon user confirmation to navigate away from the page.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.BeforeUnloadDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in beforeunload.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.FreezeDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in onfreeze.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.PageHideDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in pagehide.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.PageVibilityHiddenDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in vibilitychange (hidden).
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.ResumeDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in onresume.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentEventTiming.UnloadDuration
histogram.summary:
Microseconds spent in unload.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: DocumentScan.ConverterResult
histogram.summary: Chrome OS document scan metric that tracks whether a document scan call to the image conversion process succeeded.

histogram.name: DocumentScan.ScanResult
histogram.summary: Chrome OS document scan metric that tracks whether an attempt to scan succeeded.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBExists
histogram.summary: Tracks whether the "Origin Bound Certs" file exists in a profile. Logged each time the network context params are created for a profile, which should happen approximately once per session for a profile.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBLoadedCount
histogram.summary: Number of certs loaded from domain bound cert database.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBLoadStatus
histogram.summary: The status of loading the Channel ID database from disk. This histogram records why the database failed to load, or that it loaded successfully.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBLoadTime
histogram.summary: Time spent loading domain bound cert database.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBSizeInKB
histogram.summary: The size, on disk, of the domain bound cert database as it is being loaded.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.DBVersion
histogram.summary: The version number of the Channel ID database (before any migrations are run).

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.GenerateCertTime
histogram.summary: Time spent generating a domain bound cert.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.GetCertTime
histogram.summary: Combined time for GetDomainBoundCert retrieval (both synchronous and asynchronous).

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.GetCertTimeAsync
histogram.summary: Time for asynchronous retrieval (from the GetDomainBoundCert call until completion callback is called).

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.GetCertTimeSync
histogram.summary: Time for synchronous GetDomainBoundCert cert retrieval.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.GetDomainBoundCertResult
histogram.summary: Result of GetDomainBoundCert function.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.KillDatabaseResult
histogram.summary: Whether the domain-bound certs sqlite database was killed succesfully when an unrecoverable error was detected.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.Support
histogram.summary: Counts of SSL client sockets broken down by support for Domain Bound Certificates TLS extension. Counts only connections with full handshakes, resumed sessions are not counted.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.TaskMaxWaitTime
histogram.summary: Longest time spent by requests waiting for load of domain bound cert database.

histogram.name: DomainBoundCerts.TaskWaitCount
histogram.summary: Number of requests that waited for load of domain bound cert database.

histogram.name: DomainMixing.OneDay
histogram.summary: The distribution over daily active users of Google Search of the ratio of Google searches in the past day that were issued by the user on a Google domain that is not the primary one used by the user over the same time period.

histogram.name: DomainMixing.OneMonth
histogram.summary: The distribution over daily active users of Google Search of the ratio of Google searches in the past 30 days that were issued by the user on a Google domain that is not the primary one used by the user over the same time period.

histogram.name: DomainMixing.OneWeek
histogram.summary: The distribution over daily active users of Google Search of the ratio of Google searches in the past week that were issued by the user on a Google domain that is not the primary one used by the user over the same time period.

histogram.name: DomainMixing.TwoWeeks
histogram.summary: The distribution over daily active users of Google Search of the ratio of Google searches in the past two weeks that were issued by the user on a Google domain that is not the primary one used by the user over the same time period.

histogram.name: DomainReliability.BeaconInterval
histogram.summary: The time between successive Domain Reliability beacons being queued in the same context. (Can be arbitrarily long if no beacons are queued in a while.)
